title: fix(klein): repoint to new RunPod pod after host outage
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: New pod, who dis?
gist.blurb: We've migrated the Klein model to a fresh new RunPod instance after a host hiccup. Everything is humming along smoothly!
gist.summary: Updated the Klein model endpoint configuration to point to a new RunPod instance following a network outage on the previous host.
gist.impact: Ensures the repository configuration perfectly matches the live production environment for the Klein image model.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together to move a glowing server box (representing the Klein model) to a fresh, healthy server rack.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot carefully carrying a glowing server box to a new, healthy server rack. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
